title: OpenAI GPT-5.2 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.2](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-2) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
